evidence: standards/enterprise/privacy-compliance.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Required-reason API justification is approved only by designated human Privacy or Legal authority and must name actual use, owner, affected versions, expiry, and removal condition.
statement: Every required-reason API used by the shipped app or an included SDK maps to a human-approved reason that matches actual behavior, has a named owner, and is removed when the use ends.
